expectations.text: Uses openpyxl to create the spreadsheet
Includes SUM formulas for Total Expenses (not hardcoded values)
Includes a Savings formula (Income - Total Expenses)
Applies financial model color coding (blue for inputs, black for formulas)
Runs LibreOffice recalc to verify formula values
expectations.evidence: Shows 'python recalc.py budget.xlsx' as MANDATORY step
